lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂੜੇ ਤੈ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਰਾਮੁ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: moorre tai man te raam bisaario |
lines.english: You fool, you have forgotten the Lord from your mind!

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੂਣੁ ਖਾਇ ਕਰਹਿ ਹਰਾਮਖੋਰੀ ਪੇਖਤ ਨੈਨ ਬਿਦਾਰਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: loon khaae kareh haraamakhoree pekhat nain bidaario |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You eat His salt, and then you are untrue to Him; before your very eyes, you shall be torn apart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਇਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ॥੨॥੮॥
lines.translit: prabh bisarat mahaa dukh paaeo ihu naanak tat beechaario |2|8|
lines.english: Forgetting God, one endures utter agony; this is the essence of reality which Nanak has realized. ||2||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਾਧ ਰੋਗੁ ਉਪਜਿਓ ਤਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਟਰਤ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਟਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: asaadh rog upajio tan bheetar ttarat na kaahoo ttaario |
lines.english: The incurable disease has arisen in your body; it cannot be removed or overcome.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹ ਨੀਤਾ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavah neetaa neet |
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, continually, continuously.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਖੇ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal prabh raakhe cheet |
lines.english: I have enshrined the lotus feet of God within my consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin doojaa avar na koaoo |
lines.english: There is none other than Him at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਮਧਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਹੈ ਸੋਊ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aad madh ant hai soaoo |1|
lines.english: He alone exists, in the beginning, in the middle, and in the end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: santan kee ott aape aap |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He Himself is the Shelter of the Saints. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai vas hai sagal sansaar |
lines.english: The entire universe is under His control.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗਹਿਓ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak gahio saachaa soe |
lines.english: Nanak holds tight to that True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap aap nirankaar |
lines.english: He Himself, the Formless Lord, is Himself by Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥੯॥
lines.translit: sukh paaeaa fir dookh na hoe |2|9|
lines.english: He has found peace, and shall never suffer pain again. ||2||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਜੀਅ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਤੁਮ ਕਾਹੇ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਓ ਅਗਿਆਨਥ ॥
lines.translit: praan sukhadaataa jeea sukhadaataa tum kaahe bisaario agiaanath |
lines.english: He is the Giver of peace to the breath of life, the Giver of life to the soul; how can you forget Him, you ignorant person?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਛਾ ਮਦੁ ਚਾਖਿ ਹੋਏ ਤੁਮ ਬਾਵਰ ਦੁਲਭ ਜਨਮੁ ਅਕਾਰਥ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hochhaa mad chaakh hoe tum baavar dulabh janam akaarath |1|
lines.english: You taste the weak, insipid wine, and you have gone insane. You have uselessly wasted this precious human life. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਨਰ ਐਸੀ ਕਰਹਿ ਇਆਨਥ ॥
lines.translit: re nar aisee kareh eaanath |
lines.english: O man, such is the foolishness you practice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਸਾਰੰਗਧਰ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਤੂ ਭੂਲਾ ਮੋਹਿ ਲਪਟਿਓ ਦਾਸੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਨਥ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taj saarangadhar bhram too bhoolaa mohi lapattio daasee sang saanath |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Renouncing the Lord, the Support of the earth, you wander, deluded by doubt; you are engrossed in emotional attachment, associating with Maya, the slave-girl. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਣੀਧਰੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਨੀਚ ਕੁਲ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਹਾਵਥ ॥
lines.translit: dharaneedhar tiaag neech kul seveh hau hau karat bihaavath |
lines.english: Abandoning the Lord, the Support of the earth, you serve her of lowly ancestry, and you pass you life acting egotistically.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਹੋਤਾ ਅਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਜੋ ਬਿਨਸਤ ਸੋ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਜਾਨਥ ॥
lines.translit: sat hotaa asat kar maaniaa jo binasat so nihachal jaanath |
lines.english: That which is true, you believe to be untrue; what is transitory, you believe to be permanent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੋਕਟ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧ ਕਹਾਵਥ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: fokatt karam kareh agiaanee manamukh andh kahaavath |2|
lines.english: You do useless deeds, you ignorant person; this is why you are called a blind, self-willed manmukh. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਕੀ ਕਉ ਅਪਨੀ ਕਰਿ ਪਕਰੀ ਐਸੇ ਭੂਲ ਭੁਲਾਨਥ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: par kee kau apanee kar pakaree aise bhool bhulaanath |3|
lines.english: You grasp as your own, what belongs to others; in such delusions you are deluded. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣ ਸੂਦ ਵੈਸ ਸਭ ਏਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਰਾਨਥ ॥
lines.translit: khatree braahaman sood vais sabh ekai naam taraanath |
lines.english: The Kh'shaatriyas, Brahmins, Soodras and Vaishyas all cross over, through the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਹਤੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਸੁਨੈ ਸੋ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਾਨਥ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: gur naanak upades kehat hai jo sunai so paar paraanath |4|1|10|
lines.english: Guru Nanak speaks the Teachings; whoever listens to them is carried across. ||4||1||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਡਹਕਾਵਏ ਮਨੁਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gupat karataa sang so prabh ddahakaave manukhaae |
lines.english: You may act in secrecy, but God is still with you; you can only deceive other people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਾਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਬਿਖੈ ਭੋਗਹਿ ਤਪਤ ਥੰਮ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bisaar har jeeo bikhai bhogeh tapat tham gal laae |1|
lines.english: Forgetting your Dear Lord, you enjoy corrupt pleasures, and so you shall have to embrace red-hot pillars. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਨਰ ਕਾਇ ਪਰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: re nar kaae par grihi jaae |
lines.english: O man, why do you go out to the households of others?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਚਲ ਕਠੋਰ ਕਾਮਿ ਗਰਧਭ ਤੁਮ ਨਹੀ ਸੁਨਿਓ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kuchal katthor kaam garadhabh tum nahee sunio dharam raae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You filthy, heartless, lustful donkey! Haven't you heard of the Righteous Judge of Dharma? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਕਾਰ ਪਾਥਰ ਗਲਹਿ ਬਾਧੇ ਨਿੰਦ ਪੋਟ ਸਿਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bikaar paathar galeh baadhe nind pott siraae |
lines.english: The stone of corruption is tied around your neck, and the load of slander is on your head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਸਮੁਦੁ ਲੰਘਨਾ ਪਾਰਿ ਨ ਪਰਨਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mahaa saagar samud langhanaa paar na paranaa jaae |2|
lines.english: You must cross over the vast open ocean, but you cannot cross over to the other side. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਬਿਆਪਿਓ ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ਰਖੇ ਫਿਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohi biaapio netr rakhe firaae |
lines.english: You are engrossed in sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment; you have turned your eyes away from the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਸੁ ਉਠਾਵਨ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਮਿਲਈ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਤਰ ਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sees utthaavan na kabahoo milee mahaa dutar maae |3|
lines.english: You cannot even raise your head above the water of the vast, impassable sea of Maya. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰੁ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਸਸੀ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਅਲਿਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: soor mukataa sasee mukataa braham giaanee alipaae |
lines.english: The sun is liberated, and the moon is liberated; the God-realized being is pure and untouched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਭਾਵਤ ਜੈਸੇ ਬੈਸੰਤਰ ਅਲਿਪਤ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਮਲਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: subhaavat jaise baisantar alipat sadaa niramalaae |4|
lines.english: His inner nature is like that of fire, untouched and forever immaculate. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਖੁਲਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਹਿਆ ਪੜਦਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis karam khuliaa tis lahiaa parradaa jin gur peh maniaa subhaae |
lines.english: When good karma dawns, the wall of doubt is torn down. He lovingly accepts the Guru's Will.
